technologies.problem_addressed: Unplanned outages and reactive maintenance on nuclear plant equipment drive cost and safety risk; condition-based monitoring aims to predict component failure before it happens.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: EPRI, utility operators, university ML labs (e.g., UOIT/Ontario Tech nuclear engineering programs).
technologies.evidence_source: IAEA Nuclear Technology Review 2025 (AI in nuclear power/fuel cycle section)

technologies.problem_addressed: Existing radiation and structural-health sensors have limits on precision, durability in high-radiation fields, or real-time data output.
technologies.evidence_source: Kinectrics public job posting focus-area list; general nuclear instrumentation industry knowledge

technologies.problem_addressed: Need for lower-capital, faster-to-build, more flexible nuclear generation than large conventional reactors, including for remote/off-grid and industrial-heat applications.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Ontario Power Generation, GE Hitachi, CNSC, CNL.
technologies.evidence_source: OECD NEA Small Modular Reactor Dashboard, 3rd Edition (2025); public reporting on OPG's Darlington New Nuclear Project

technologies.problem_addressed: In-service inspection of reactor components, steam generators, and high-radiation areas is dangerous and time-consuming for human workers.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: NDE/inspection vendors, CNSC (qualification pathway), Canadian Nuclear Laboratories (CNL).
technologies.evidence_source: Kinectrics public job posting focus-area list; general robotics-in-nuclear industry literature

technologies.problem_addressed: Plant operators lack a continuously-updated virtual model that mirrors real asset condition for simulation, training, and life-extension planning.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Digital-twin platform vendors, university simulation labs, CNL.
technologies.evidence_source: IAEA Nuclear Technology Review 2025 (AI/digital tools section)

technologies.problem_addressed: Visual and radiological survey of tall structures (stacks, cooling towers), spent-fuel pools, and post-accident sites is hazardous or inaccessible for humans.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Commercial drone-services firms, Transport Canada (airspace approvals), site operators.
technologies.evidence_source: Public reporting on Fukushima Daiichi drone/robot survey programs (IAEA and international media coverage)

technologies.problem_addressed: Long lead times and obsolescence risk for spare parts, especially for aging CANDU-fleet components no longer in standard production.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Materials-science university labs, CNL, AM equipment vendors.
technologies.evidence_source: IAEA Nuclear Technology Review 2025 (fuel cycle / manufacturing innovation sections); general public reporting on AM pilot use in commercial reactors

technologies.problem_addressed: Global supply reliability for medical isotopes (e.g., Mo-99/Tc-99m generators, Lu-177) used in diagnostics and cancer therapy, especially after past reactor-supply disruptions.
technologies.commercialization_timeline_years: 0-1 (mature, with newer isotopes at earlier stage)
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Canadian Nuclear Laboratories, hospital/oncology networks, Health Canada.
technologies.evidence_source: Public historical record of Canada's NRU reactor medical-isotope role; general nuclear-medicine industry reporting

technologies.problem_addressed: Safe, cost-effective dismantling and site restoration of retired reactors and nuclear facilities, including remote segmentation of activated components.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Canadian Nuclear Laboratories, decommissioning contractors, CNSC.
technologies.evidence_source: CNSC public regulatory oversight reports on decommissioning sites; general industry knowledge of the global decommissioning wave

technologies.problem_addressed: Hands-on training in live radiological environments is limited by dose constraints and outage scheduling; skilled-worker pipeline is also a known industry concern.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Colleges/universities with VR labs, industrial-training VR vendors.
technologies.evidence_source: Kinectrics public job posting focus-area list

technologies.problem_addressed: Conventional light-water reactor designs have limits on fuel efficiency, waste volume, and operating temperature for industrial-heat applications; Gen IV designs (molten salt, sodium-cooled fast, high-temperature gas) target these gaps.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: Terrestrial Energy, university reactor-physics departments, CNL.
technologies.evidence_source: IAEA Nuclear Technology Review 2025 (fast reactors / advanced fuel cycle sections); public information on Terrestrial Energy's IMSR program

technologies.problem_addressed: Detecting corrosion, cracking, or radiation damage in structural materials early enough to act before failure.
technologies.evidence_source: Kinectrics public job posting focus-area list only — no independent technology-specific public source verified in this research pass

technologies.problem_addressed: Achieving net-positive, commercially viable fusion power generation as a long-horizon clean firm-power source.
technologies.partnership_opportunities: General Fusion (Canadian), university plasma-physics departments, ITER-affiliated research networks.
technologies.evidence_source: IAEA Nuclear Technology Review 2025 (fusion research and technology development section); public information on General Fusion

technologies.problem_addressed: Long-term safe storage/disposal of used nuclear fuel and other radioactive waste, including siting and containment technology for permanent repositories.
technologies.revenue_impact_tier: Low (public-mandate program, not a commercial revenue play)
technologies.partnership_opportunities: NWMO, CNSC, geotechnical engineering firms, host-community organizations.
technologies.evidence_source: NWMO public program materials (deep geological repository); general public knowledge of international analogs (e.g., Finland's Onkalo)
